answear_1.text: First of all, I’m not an adventurer, and secondly, a wizard has cast a curse on me that makes me spin constantly.

question_2.name: Liam
question_2.text: Oh okay i understand... Then who are you?

choice_1.text: I am an ordinary resident of a nearby village.

choice_2.text: THEY CALL ME THE ULTIMATE ULTRA WIZARD SLAYER 3000

choice_3.text: I am a very serious person.

answear_2.name: Liam
answear_2.text: Oh okay nice to meet you

question_3.name: Liam
question_3.text: So what are you doing here?

answear_3.name: {player_name}
answear_3.text: Im here to get rid of this stupid curse!!

question_4.name: Liam
question_4.text: Okay i see you have a revolver with you.. Do you know how to use it? I could help you!

choice_2_1.name: {player_name}
choice_2_1.text: Yes i know how to use it duhh?

answear_4_1.name: Liam
answear_4_1.text: Okay so you shoot with LMB and you reload with...

answear_4_2.name: Liam
answear_4_2.text: No problem my friend. You shoot using LMB and reload with R. Dash is bound to Shift. You can focus using the spacebar, and if you spin fast enough, press space to fire a special attack.

answear_5_1.name: {player_name}
answear_5_1.text: I SAID I KNOW HOW TO USE IT!!!!!!
